subcodes.first_line: O Nazim! In meanings the ghazal was of consummate eloquence and fluency, and its themes were sweet and full of delicate grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم در معانی غزل در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت بود و مضامین شیرین و پرحلاوت بدقت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts
